

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
import {vl} from "@vega/vega-lite-api-v5"
import {aq, op} from '@uwdata/arquero'
// geo = require("geotoolbox@2")
// arrow = require('apache-arrow')
// pq = {
//   const pq = await import('https://unpkg.com/parquet-wasm@0.1.1/web.js')
//   await pq.default()
//   return pq
// }
// dataRaw = FileAttachment("data/data.parquet")
// data = pq.readParquet(new Uint8Array(await dataRaw.arrayBuffer()))
```
